name: Lemon-Cherry Layered Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the cherry or raspberry gelatin in 1 cup of boiling water.
2. Stir in the cherry pie filling. Pour into a 10-inch deep-dish pie plate and chill until partially thickened.
3. Dissolve the lemon gelatin in 1 cup of boiling water.
4. Beat the cream cheese and mayonnaise together, then stir in the unchilled lemon gelatin mixture.
5. Blend in the undrained pineapple. Whip the heavy whipping cream until soft peaks form and fold it into the lemon mixture.
6. Add the marshmallows if desired. Spread this mixture on top of the chilled cherry pie mixture.
7. Sprinkle the chopped nuts over the top and let chill until completely set.
